title: Climate Scientists Used the World’s Most Powerful Supercomputers to Find Out if Middle Earth and Westeros Could Actually Exist - ZME Science

Researchers warn that global warming is altering the planet's rotation: with the melting of the polar ice caps and the redistribution of water in the oceans, the days are getting longer at a rate unseen for at least 3,6 million years. - CPG Click Petróleo e Gás
